org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.router
Class MediaHubConfigSample

java.lang.Object
  org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.Configuration
      org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.RouterConfig
          org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.router.MediaHubConfigSample
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
public class MediaHubConfigSample
extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.RouterConfig
implements java.io.Serializable

Creates a sample configuration file for the MediaHub. This is based off the Vorpal:BLADE RouterConfig class. For the MediaHub application, the config should be broken into two pieces. Global routes should appear in "/config/custom/vorpal/mediahub.json". Static routes specific to 'engine1' should appear in "/config/custom/vorpal/server/engine1/mediahub.json".

See Also:
